basic_details.job_title: PAU Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Young Professional-II Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of PAU. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PAU Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in any discipline with minimum OGPA of 6.00/10.00 or 60% marks, M.Sc. Agricultural Economics/ M.Sc. Sociology/ M.Sc. Economics with minimum OGPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks
qualification.details: Graduation in any discipline with a minimum OGPA of 6.00/10.00 or 60% marks. M.Sc. Agricultural Economics / M.Sc. Sociology / M.Sc. Economics with a minimum OGPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Young Professional-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the PAU Young Professional-II recruitment is 17th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduation degree in any discipline with at least 60% marks or an OGPA of 6.00/10.00. Additionally, an M.Sc. in Agricultural Economics, Sociology, or Economics with at least 65% marks or an OGPA of 6.50/10.00 is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-II position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years for the Young Professional-II post at Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-II role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Young Professional-II position will receive a fixed monthly salary of Rs. 35,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the PAU Young Professional-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Young Professional-II position announced by Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Young Professional-II recruitment will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the PAU Young Professional-II recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 200/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Young Professional-II position at Punjab Agricultural University is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University, which is https://pau.edu.
